data.body: Kids (and adults) were better off when they really had to learn to tell time on an analog clock and physically count out change and write neatly and quickly on paper. If I had any of my own, I'd probably go ~98% Waldorf (they would however get ALL the vaccines) and have entire weeks without devices.
data.author: did:plc:qtuj4appzq44yyelta6x7roo

data.body: It'd be months without devices except frankly *I* haven't had an entire device-free month in which I was actually conscious for any part of said month since I was a toddler (in the early 1980s); if they *really* needed a device fast I'd be looking for a magically inexpensive but lengthy summer camp.
